title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to help developers convert Oracle database schemas and code to PostgreSQL equivalents. The tutorial covers mapping Oracle data types such as VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE to their PostgreSQL equivalents with full precision and internationalization support.
